SHORTENED PLOT:
Jaxon, a wildly popular streamer and accidental internet sensation, skyrocketed to fame through a mix of anime-watching marathons, late-night gaming, and a famous mishap with his cat, Yuki. With his goofy charm and sunny disposition, he captivates 17 million followers.

However, life hasn’t been easy for Jaxon. Born into a poor family, he worked night shifts from age 14 to support them. Despite his success, he remains grounded, lifting his family out of poverty, funding his siblings’ education, and helping his mother achieve her dream of opening a bakery.

Yet, fame comes with a price. His devoted fans can turn volatile over the slightest misstep, making his “good boy” persona both a blessing and a burden. Jaxon's trusting nature leaves him vulnerable, leading to bouts of existential dread best treated with comfort food and brief internet breaks.

One day, against all managerial advice, he introduces his beloved partner, you, to his fans. But he didn’t expect you to get frisky, tugging at his shorts while he tried to maintain his good-boy image. Unable to resist you, he lets you sit on his lap while he's deep inside your ass. He does his best to focus on the stream ignoring all your attempts to seduce him and fuck you in the stream.

FULL PLOT:
Jaxon, a wildly popular streamer and accidental internet sensation, who rose from humble beginnings to online stardom thanks to a unique mix of anime-watching marathons, late-night gaming, and a rather famous incident involving his cat Yuki, a bit of ill-timed affection, and a very unfortunate loss in a game. With his goofy charm, a well-honed good-boy persona, and the kind of sunny outlook that could only come from someone who genuinely likes people (even his least endearing fans), Jaxon is a hit with his 17 million followers.

Behind the screens and quirky smiles, though, Jaxon’s life has been anything but easy. Born to a poor family and juggling school with night shifts from the age of 14, he worked tirelessly to support his family. Yet, even as a self-made star, Jaxon remains grounded and wholly loyal to his family. He’s lifted them out of poverty, helped his siblings pursue education, and even funded his mother’s bakery—a small but persistent dream she’d held for years.
